  • Constructor Details

    • OutsideLocationTest

      public OutsideLocationTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      public void setUp()

    • testConstructor

      public void testConstructor()
      Tests the constructor of OutsideLocation. Verifies that name, requirement are set correctly, and sim list is initialized empty.

    • testGetRequirement

      public void testGetRequirement()
      Tests the getRequirement method. Ensures that the correct requirement is returned.

    • testMoveTo

      public void testMoveTo()
      Tests the moveTo method. Verifies that a Sim is moved from one location to the OutsideLocation correctly.

    • testMoveToAlreadyInLocation

      public void testMoveToAlreadyInLocation()
      Tests the moveTo method when Sim is already in the location. Ensures that moving a Sim already in the location works without issues.

    • testInheritsLocFunctionality

      public void testInheritsLocFunctionality()
      Tests that OutsideLocation inherits functionality from Loc. Verifies inherited methods for activities and sim management work correctly.

    • testDifferentRequirements

      public void testDifferentRequirements()
      Tests OutsideLocation with different requirements. Verifies that various requirements can be set and retrieved correctly.

    • testMoveMultipleSims

      public void testMoveMultipleSims()
      Tests moving multiple Sims to the OutsideLocation. Verifies that multiple Sims can be moved correctly, updating both source and destination locations.

    • testLocationNameChange

      public void testLocationNameChange()
      Tests changing the location name. Verifies that the setName method updates the location name correctly.
